hero.title: VideoChat with models
hero.subtitle: Connect instantly with real models, live, in a 1-to-1 experience inspired by platforms like Coomeet, but with SharemeChat technology and full control.
hero.freeTrial: Sign up and try it FREE.

cookies.bannerText: By clicking “Accept all cookies”, you agree to cookies being stored on your device to improve site navigation, analyze site usage, and support our marketing efforts. For more information, see our Cookie Policy.

modelDocuments.title: Identity verification
modelDocuments.subtitle: Upload photos of your document and a verification file so we can approve your model profile.
modelDocuments.reviewHint: Check that the photos are sharp and that the data is readable. Our team will review the information as soon as possible.

veriff.title: Identity verification (Veriff)
veriff.subtitle: We are redirecting you to the verification provider.
veriff.hint: If the problem persists, the administrator can enable the manual KYC flow.

errors.start: Could not start verification with Veriff.

front.title: Document (front)
front.subtitle: Upload the front side of your ID card or identity document.
front.hint: Accepted formats: JPG/PNG. Make sure all details are clearly visible.
front.confirmDelete: Delete the front image of the document?

back.title: Document (back)
back.subtitle: Upload the back side of your ID card or identity document.
back.hint: Accepted formats: JPG/PNG. Make sure there are no reflections or cropped edges.
back.confirmDelete: Delete the back image of the document?

verificationFile.title: Selfie with ID or verification document
verificationFile.subtitle: You can upload a photo of yourself with the document visible or a verification PDF.
verificationFile.hint: Accepted formats: JPG/PNG or PDF. Make sure your face and the document are clearly visible.

nextSteps.title: What happens next?
nextSteps.prefix: Once your identity is approved, you will be able to complete your
nextSteps.suffix: by uploading a profile photo and introduction video from the Profile section.
